title: eupatorium cannabinum subsp. cannabinum
intro: Eupatorium cannabinum subsp. cannabinum, also known as Hemp Agrimony, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its tall stems and clusters of small white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eupatorium cannabinum subsp. cannabinum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the management of fever and cold symptoms. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
